description: Synthetic contract clauses inspired by the CUAD dataset for legal AI research and agent-based analysis.

clauses.text: All confidential information disclosed by either party during the term of this Agreement shall be kept strictly confidential and shall not be disclosed to any third party without prior written consent, except as required by law.
This Agreement may be terminated by either party at any time without prior notice or cause, and without any liability arising from such termination.
In no event shall the Company be liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages, including loss of profits or data, even if advised of the possibility of such damages.
This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of California, without regard to its conflict of laws principles.
The Company may collect, store, process, and share user data with affiliated third parties for analytics, marketing, and operational purposes.
The user agrees to indemnify and hold harmless the Company from any claims, damages, or expenses arising out of the user's misuse of the services.
All payments shall be non-refundable and must be made within seven (7) days of invoice issuance, regardless of service performance.
Confidential information may be disclosed to employees and contractors on a need-to-know basis, provided such individuals are bound by confidentiality obligations.
Either party may terminate this Agreement upon thirty (30) days written notice if the other party breaches any material term and fails to cure within fifteen (15) days.
All intellectual property rights created during the term of this Agreement shall be the sole and exclusive property of the Company.
The Contractor agrees not to engage in any competing business activities within a 100-mile radius for a period of two (2) years following termination.
The Company disclaims all warranties, express or implied, including but not limited to merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.
Neither party shall be liable for any failure to perform due to events beyond their reasonable control, including natural disasters, war, or government actions.
This Agreement may not be assigned by either party without the prior written consent of the other party.
Any disputes arising under this Agreement shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with the rules of the American Arbitration Association.
The receiving party shall protect confidential information with the same degree of care it uses for its own confidential information, but in no event less than reasonable care.
User data may be retained indefinitely and used for product improvement, research, and development purposes without further notice.
The Company's total liability under this Agreement shall not exceed the amount paid by the customer in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.
Invoices are due within fifteen (15) days of receipt. Late payments will incur interest at a rate of 1.5% per month.
This Agreement shall automatically terminate upon the insolvency or bankruptcy of either party.
The Company reserves the right to audit the Customer's use of the services at any time with 48 hours notice.
This Agreement may be amended or modified only by written agreement signed by both parties.
Each party shall indemnify the other against third-party claims arising from its breach of this Agreement or negligent acts.
The Customer grants the Company a perpetual, irrevocable license to use any feedback or suggestions provided regarding the services.
This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of Delaware, and the parties consent to exclusive jurisdiction in Delaware courts.
Confidential information shall remain confidential for a period of five (5) years following disclosure.
During the term and for six (6) months thereafter, the Employee shall not solicit any customers or employees of the Company.
The Company warrants that services will be performed in a professional and workmanlike manner in accordance with industry standards.
The Company may anonymize and aggregate user data for statistical analysis and may share such data with third parties.
Subscription fees are billed annually in advance and are non-refundable, even if services are terminated early.
Performance obligations shall be suspended during any force majeure event, and the term shall be extended accordingly.
Under no circumstances shall either party be liable for any special, exemplary, or consequential damages whatsoever.
The Company may suspend or terminate services immediately if Customer violates any terms, without refund or liability.
The parties waive their right to a jury trial and agree to resolve disputes through individual arbitration only, with no class actions permitted.
The Company may assign this Agreement to any affiliate or successor without Customer consent.
Trade secrets and proprietary algorithms shall remain confidential in perpetuity, even after Agreement termination.
Any modifications, enhancements, or derivative works created by Customer shall become the property of the Company.
Customer shall defend, indemnify, and hold harmless the Company from all claims related to Customer's use of the services.
By using the service, you grant the Company an irrevocable, worldwide license to use, reproduce, and distribute your content.
Services are provided 'as is' without warranty of any kind, and the Company does not warrant uninterrupted or error-free operation.
Any legal action must be brought within one (1) year of the claim arising, or such claim shall be permanently barred.
The Company reserves the right to modify these terms at any time by posting updated terms on its website, with continued use constituting acceptance.
Prices are subject to change at any time without notice, and Customer will be charged the then-current rates.
Customer shall maintain records for three (3) years and provide access to Company auditors upon reasonable request.
The Consultant shall not provide services to any competitor for the duration of this engagement and twelve (12) months thereafter.
All materials, documents, and information shared during negotiations shall be considered confidential, whether or not marked as such.
Upon termination for any reason, Customer must immediately cease all use of the services and destroy all related materials.
The Company shall not be liable for any damages arising from unauthorized access to or use of Customer data.
Customer data may be stored on servers located in any country, and Customer consents to international data transfers.
Customer retains ownership of its pre-existing IP, but grants Company a license to use such IP as necessary to provide the services.
The Company shall indemnify Customer only for claims directly resulting from Company's gross negligence or willful misconduct.
Pandemic, epidemic, or public health emergency shall constitute a force majeure event excusing performance.
Arbitration shall take place in New York City, and each party shall bear its own costs and expenses.
Customer may not assign this Agreement without Company's written consent, which may be withheld in Company's sole discretion.
Customer warrants that it has all necessary rights and permissions to provide Company with any content or data under this Agreement.
This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of England and Wales, and disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of London courts.
All fees are exclusive of taxes, and Customer is responsible for all applicable sales, use, and value-added taxes.
Either party may disclose confidential information if required by law, provided reasonable notice is given to the other party.
The Company uses cookies and tracking technologies to monitor user behavior and improve services, and users consent to such use.
Either party may terminate for convenience with ninety (90) days written notice, provided all outstanding fees are paid.
All trademarks, logos, and brand names displayed in connection with the services remain the property of their respective owners.
Notwithstanding any other provision, the Company's liability for data loss shall not exceed the cost of recreating such data from backups.
The parties acknowledge that geographic restrictions may not be enforceable in certain jurisdictions and agree to substitute reasonable alternatives.
Customer shall reimburse Company for all reasonable legal fees incurred in defending claims arising from Customer's breach.
No waiver of any provision shall be deemed a waiver of any other provision or subsequent breach of the same provision.
If an audit reveals underpayment exceeding 5%, Customer shall pay audit costs in addition to the underpayment.
The Company warrants compliance with applicable data protection laws but makes no warranties regarding third-party components.
If a force majeure event continues for more than sixty (60) days, either party may terminate this Agreement without liability.
Customer data will be retained for seven (7) years after termination for legal and compliance purposes.
The parties irrevocably submit to the jurisdiction of the courts of Singapore and waive any objection to venue.
Customer shall pay a setup fee equal to 50% of the first year's subscription, which is non-refundable.
The obligation of confidentiality shall not apply to information that was independently developed without reference to confidential information.
Upon termination, the Company shall provide Customer with a data export in a standard format within thirty (30) days.
Customer agrees not to reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble any portion of the software or services.
The arbitrator's decision shall be final and binding, and judgment may be entered in any court of competent jurisdiction.
The Company shall not be liable for any failure or delay in performance resulting from Customer's failure to meet its obligations.
Indemnification obligations shall survive termination or expiration of this Agreement indefinitely.
The Company may use Customer testimonials and logos for marketing purposes unless Customer opts out in writing.
In the event of a merger or acquisition, this Agreement shall automatically transfer to the successor entity.
Customer acknowledges that the Company has made no representations or warranties beyond those expressly stated in this Agreement.
This non-compete provision shall be severable, and if any part is unenforceable, the remaining portions shall remain in effect.
Customer authorizes Company to automatically charge the payment method on file for all recurring fees.
The United Nations Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods shall not apply to this Agreement.
Upon request, the receiving party shall certify in writing that all confidential information has been returned or destroyed.
The party affected by a force majeure event shall provide prompt written notice with details of the event and expected duration.
